betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6ICF§f (Inertial Confinement Fusion) is an advanced fusion system that uses §blasers§f to compress fusion fuel.

§eDifferent from Magnetic Fusion:§f
• Uses lasers instead of magnetic containment
• More compact design
• Requires precision laser equipment

§eComponents:§f
• §bICF Laser§f - Primary ignition source
• §bICF Laser Turbocharger§f - Boosts compression power
• §bSpark Laser Crystal§f - Amplifies output
• §bICF Fuel Pellets§f - Specialized fusion fuel

§eOperation:§f
• Lasers focus massive energy onto fuel pellets
• Compression causes fusion ignition
• Generates enormous power output

§aTip:§f ICF represents an alternative to magnetic Fusion Reactors - more compact but requiring different infrastructure.
